objects.prompt: VIEW TOP DOWN 2D"Highly detailed 32x32 pixel art game arena floor asset. Perspective: Low top-down view from the South (facing camera). The asset is a rectangular combat arena floor surface. Style is a fusion of Stardew Valley-like charm with a modern Tokyo-meets-New York urban aesthetic. The surface features weathered industrial concrete with glowing neon blue power-grid lines embedded in the floor, reinforced metal plates in the corners, and clear circular indicator markings for combat bounds. Gritty, high-contrast, clean pixel outlines. Isolated on a neutral background."
